title: rubus innoxius
intro: Rubus innoxius, also known as the wild raspberry or thimbleberry, is a type of bramble that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rubus innoxius include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Rubus innoxius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and help manage diabetes. The herbal preparations of Rubus innoxius typically involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves, stems, and roots, which can be used to support overall well-being.
